rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 49]>其实……<unk[5:0]>据说在这座驿站
能听见很像塞尔达殿下的声音……
我从提供情报的鸟儿那里得到这个消息后，
就径直飞过来了……<unk[5:1]>但总感觉有点怪怪的。
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>经过我的一番采访调查后得知，据说一到<Color=red>晚上<Color=white>，
<Color=red>西北方的阿拉弗拉平原<Color=white>就会传出声音。
“放下……<unk[5:2]>武器……<unk[5:2]>
放下……<unk[5:2]>武器……”<unk[5:2]>
……就是这样的声音。

<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>听上去像是什么法术的咒语，亦或是什么诅咒……<unk[5:1]>
不行不行，<unk[5:0]>吓得我都起鸡皮疙瘩了……<Size=100>
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>据说听见这诡异之声的旅行者们
被吓得一屁股坐在地上……

如果真是塞尔达殿下，那她究竟有什么目的……
看来要想查明真相的话……<unk[5:2]>
还是得去一次事发现场。

<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 49]>其實呢……<unk[5:0]>我從提供情報的鳥兒那收到
一個小道消息後就飛了過來……
據說這間驛站有人聽見疑似薩爾達殿下的聲音……<unk[5:1]>
但總覺得怪怪的。
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>根據我打聽來的情報，只要到了<Color=red>晚上<Color=white>，
就能聽到有聲音從<Color=red>西北方的阿拉弗拉平原<Color=white>傳來。
「卸下……<unk[5:2]>武器……<unk[5:2]>」
「卸下……<unk[5:2]>武器……<unk[5:2]>」
……像是這樣的聲音。

<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>這或許是某種咒語，或是某種詛咒……<unk[5:1]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 49]>Well, let me give you the scoop... Some
folks have heard a voice near here that
sounds like Princess Zelda.
I heard the chirps and warbles from my
little birds and headed straight here, but
something is fishy...
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>For starters, the strange voice is crowing
from <Color=red>Fural Plain to the northwest<Color=white>, night
after night after night.
"Leave the...rms... <unk[5:0]>Leave the...rms..."


At least, that's what I heard. I didn't get
too close.

<Size=80><unk[3:0:268]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Got outta there fast. Felt like a curse just blowing
through on the wind. No, sir. Not going to think
about it.<Size=100>
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>Anyway, all the travelers who heard the
eerie voice have gotten spooked by it!

They've been throwing their weapons
down the well and then running away as
fast as they can.
<unk[3:0:263]>Could the voice really belong to Princess
Zelda? She's not usually so...haunting.

All we can do is seek out the truth,
partner! Even if it is a little scary...

虽然没有搭档你那么害怕，但确实有点……<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:8]>所以我想说，这次就不要单独行动了，
我们一起去调查吧！

rows.USen:

night after night after night...

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 49]>Oh no. <unk[5:0]>What if it's one of those curses
where saying the words out loud causes it

case. <unk[5:1]>Sorry for getting my feathers
ruffled, partner.
Anyway, the strange voice can only be
heard at night, so come and get me when
it's time to head out. Don't forget!

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>これで<Ruby={2:4}なぞ>謎は<Ruby={4:8}かいめい>解明！ <Ruby={8:18}いっけんらくちゃく>一件落着！<unk[5:0]>

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77 95 48 48]>It's just someone, er, singing in a well?
She's just practicing?

<unk[3:0:268]>Huh... I see...


<unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>And her voice echoed off the well walls,
making it sound like the princess's voice.
Acoustics are strange...
And that same distortion made the lyrics
she was singing sound more like threats
to everyone who heard her.
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>Ha! So the mystery is solved! <unk[5:0]> Now I know
why I had all those goosebumps! I sensed
one heck of a story coming my way!
Thanks for your help, partner!

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>毕竟要赶紧写报道，

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>聲音主人不是公主殿下這件事，

<Ruby={2:4}はや>早いとこ<Ruby={4:4}きじ>記事にしないとな！

<unk[3:0:257]>OK, I'll head on back to the office and
